feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Invoice payment block using QM control key for Embedded EWM Goods Receipt in Public Cloud 2602
entry.content:
Even after maintaining QM Control key '0007' for invoice payment block in QM view, the system is not restricting the payment of GR through WM inbound delivery in Public cloud . The purchase order QA control key shows: 'supplier release, invoice block'.

Inspection lots are created with origin '17' with inspection type 01 maintained. Quality info record also maintained.

entry.title: Error in Manage Automatic Payments app
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team

In Manage Automatic Payments app, In Payments Processed no exists any icon to add documents.

Are there any places to add documents in Manage Automatic Payments app?

Thanks

entry.title: Unable to assign new GL account to custom movement type which is a copy of existing movement type
entry.content:
We have a business scenario where separate consumption account need to be determined if the material is issued to cost center for R&D purposes and regular production consumption. 

We created a custom movement type 901 which is a copy of movement type 201 and assign a account modifier ZBR. Please see attached screenshot for additional information.

while setting up automatic account determination, we do not see general modification "ZBR" in the drop down. Please see screenshot for additional information. 

We cannot create a separate valuation class as it means we have to create a separate material for the same material which is practically infeasible suggestion.

Is there any enhancement option available to change the account assignment or is this item on the roadmap?

entry.title: The Financial Statement Version is tied to a released transport
entry.content:
I am editing the Financial Statement Version (ZFS1).
Although I was able to save it, I receive the error message "Task BEMK900345 is not in status modifiable" when attempting to activate it.

Task BEMK900345 is part of a transport that has already been released.
I have created a new transport request; however, I am unable to select it when editing ZFS1, and the system continues to use the information from the previous change.

I would like to assign this to task BEMK900347 under transport request BEMK900346.

entry.title: How to Configure OAuth 2.0 Authentication Between SAP Integration Suite (CPI) & S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

I am working on an integration scenario where SAP Integration Suite (Cloud Integration/CPI) needs to consume APIs from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition using OAuth 2.0 authentication.

Scenario

My requirement is to retrieve Sales Order data from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition into SAP CPI through an iFlow. Instead of using Basic Authentication, I would like to use OAuth 2.0 for secure communication between CPI and S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

What configurations are required in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP Integration Suite?

I am looking for guidance on the complete setup required on both SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP Integration Suite to enable CPI to securely consume Sales Order data using OAuth 2.0 authentication.

Any documentation references, implementation experiences, or configuration examples would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Unable to reverse UD and stock reversal for incoming Material Inspection in Public Cloud
entry.content: Please let us know how to reverse the Usage Decision for incoming material that mistakenly got approved and moved to unrestricted stock.

entry.title: Is there any way to get published v4 apis through api?
entry.content:
Dear Community,

For the published available OData V2 apis, we can use following service URL in the communication scenario SAP_COM_0087: 

https://myXXXXXX-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=0002

However, I do not find the one for the available published OData V4 apis in any communication scenarios.

Could anyone please tell me how can I find it?

I would be so grateful if there is any information.

 

Thanks&Regards

entry.title: Customer Returns Delivery (A2X) API is Not long text
entry.content: Customer Returns Delivery (A2X) API is not found long text

entry.title: Business Partner Migration from R3 into S4 Hana public cloud
entry.content:
Hi all,

we are designing the customer and supplier master concept for an S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition migration and would value experience from anyone who has solved this.

Scenario: we need to harmonize legacy R/3 customers (debtors) and suppliers (creditors) into a single Business Partner, but keep the original customer and supplier numbers as the operative KUNNR and LIFNR, because several 3rd-party systems use these numbers as primary keys. The legacy debtor and creditor ranges overlap (debtor 123 and creditor 123 can be different entities), so same-number for the legacy population is not possible.

Our preferred target, but we have never implemented it:
- The BP gets its own neutral internal number.
- KUNNR and LIFNR keep their different legacy numbers via external assignment (Flexible Grouping, "Same Numbers" off in SSCUI 102741 and 102742).
- A dual-role entity is one BP with, for example, BP 50001, KUNNR 123, LIFNR 456 (three different numbers).
- New business partners going forward use same-number (BP = KUNNR = LIFNR).

What we tried so far: we deactivated "Same Numbers" and used the two-step approach (migrate Customer, then "Supplier - extend existing record by new org levels"). In our tests the BP, customer and supplier always end up with the identical number, so we keep getting same-number behavior and cannot produce three different numbers on one BP. References we worked from: SAP Note 2748819 and KBA 3393756.

We also evaluated the alternatives, but each has a significant downside, which is why we prefer the approach above:
- Storing the legacy numbers as BP identification numbers/types (the SAP-standard route): would force custom resolution logic in every single 3rd-party interface, an anti-pattern for our landscape.
- Separate Business Partners for the debtor and the creditor role: goes against the one-BP-per-entity model, and we hit known issues with duplicate identification numbers in another project.
- Customer-side data cleansing and renumbering: would mean changing the primary keys in the downstream systems, which is exactly what we must avoid.

Questions:
1) Is our preferred target (one BP, different KUNNR and LIFNR, neutral BP number) actually achievable in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and would you recommend it?
2) What is the correct configuration and migration sequence to end up with three different numbers on one BP? What are we most likely missing, given our attempts keep collapsing to same-number?
3) Any pitfalls at scale (100k+ records), e.g. CVIV_UI 6 "Enter External Number" or CVI_EI011/CVI_EI041?
4) For a dual-role entity, is Customer first plus "Supplier - extend existing record by new org levels" the right path, and how do you keep the two numbers distinct without a need for special logic in the underlying interfaces?

Thanks a lot for any working configuration, steps, or lessons learned.

entry.title: no code/ low code report
entry.content:
it's first time for me to work with public cloud project and i have two tasks 

- build an api for integration with add field custom to standard api

- build an abap report 

so anyone can help me with blog or doc.

entry.title: 財務諸表バージョンや利益センタグループの有効期間での表示内容確認
entry.content:
本件は以前ケース登録したSR:637765/2026 の回答内容に関する詳細確認となります。
以下に詳細確認の内容を記載します。
SR:637765/2026 の回答内容に以下の記載がございました。
ー試算表アプリでは、財務諸表バージョンはレポート階層としてサポートされていません。
ーアプリは総勘定元帳の勘定階層のみを使用します。

上記部分でサポートされないとは何を意味するのでしょうか。
※残高試算表で財務諸表バージョンは階層として指定は可能になっています。

例として、現在、財務諸表バージョン：AAAA　有効期間：①2025/1/1~2025/12/31、②2026/1/1~9999/12/31で①②ともにステータス：有効としているため、このステータス：有効を財務諸表バージョン内で1つにすれば有効なバージョンで出力できるのではと思っています。

entry.title: Authorization of Supplier Invoice Operation
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I got a customer request of authorization setting about supplier invoice operation:

Purchaser from purchase department can create supplier invoice, but can not post the invoice. Only users from finance department can post the supplier invoice.

I created a business role Z_BR_AP_ACCOUNTANT (from SAP_BR_AP_ACCOUNTANT). If I assign this role to purchaser, the purchaser will be able to create and post supplier invoice at same time, which is not acceptable.

So how to create business roles or set restrictions to meet this request, thanks.

Best Regards,

Chris

entry.title: Direct Method Cash Flow Statement with Basic Cash Management Scope?
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Is it possible to generate a Cash Flow Statement using the Direct Method with the Basic Cash Management scope (BFA/BFB) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, with values being populated?

Or is the Full Cash Management scope required to generate the Direct Method Cash Flow Statement with values?

Thank you.

entry.title: Best practice for scope item 5W2 (Group Valuation) when future requirements are uncertain
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have a question regarding scope item 5W2 – Group Valuation in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

As far as I understand, 5W2 can only be activated as part of the initial scoping and cannot be added later once the implementation has progressed.

We are currently working with a customer who does not require Group Valuation today. However, they cannot completely rule out that this requirement may arise in the future as their group structure and reporting requirements evolve.

In such a situation, what is SAP's recommended approach?

  • Is it considered a best practice to activate 5W2 proactively during the initial scoping phase, even if there is currently no confirmed business requirement?
  • Are there any disadvantages or additional complexities associated with activating 5W2 "just in case"?
  • How does SAP generally advise customers to handle scope items that cannot be activated later but may become relevant in the future?

I would appreciate any guidance, SAP recommendations, or lessons learned from project experience.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Is a completed Digital Discovery Assessment (DDA) mandatory before starting an PC Project?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have a question regarding the role of the Digital Discovery Assessment (DDA) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition projects.

According to SAP Activate, the DDA is performed during the Discover phase and serves as the basis for defining scope, country versions, integrations, and the overall solution approach.

However, in practice, projects sometimes start with an incomplete or partially validated DDA due to timeline constraints, ongoing business decisions, or evolving requirements.

My questions are:

  • Is a completed and formally finalized DDA considered a mandatory prerequisite before starting an implementation project?
  • Does SAP have an official recommendation regarding projects that start without a fully completed DDA?
  • What are the main risks or implications from SAP's perspective if the implementation begins while parts of the DDA are still open or under discussion?
  • Have other customers or partners successfully started projects with an incomplete DDA, and if so, how was scope governance handled?

I would appreciate any SAP guidance, best practices, or project experiences.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Recommendation for configuration role based on standard template SAP_BR_BPC_EXPERT
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts, 

We are creating the business roles in an S/4HANA Public Cloud system. We were planning to create a role for access to configure in implementation activities as a copy of the SAP standard business role template SAP_BR_BPC_EXPERT to grant access to all the configuration points. 

The problem we are facing is that the business role template SAP_BR_BPC_EXPERT in our system has almost 300 catalogs, and we get this message when working with the business role:

And then checking the Best Practices for Business Roles | SAP Help Portal in fact SAP is recommending "Not more than 100 business catalogs should be assigned to a business role".

My questions:

  1. Is there any SAP recommendation on how to handle business roles based on the business role template SAP_BR_BPC_EXPERT?
  2. Is there any SAP recommendation on how to set up the security to grant permissions to update the configuration in an S/4HANA Public Cloud system? 

Thanks.

entry.title: CALM: How is the Upgrade Roadmap used in parallel with an Implementation Roadmap?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Upgrade Roadmap states:

"The roadmap can be used as a standalone mini project for a customer who is already live with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, without ongoing projects. It can also be used in parallel, or have tasks added to an ongoing new implementation or continuous improvement project."

My understanding is therefore that SAP explicitly supports using upgrade activities during an ongoing implementation project.

However, in SAP Cloud ALM, a project appears to be assigned to a single SAP Activate roadmap.

My question is:

How is SAP's recommendation implemented in SAP Cloud ALM when upgrade activities need to be managed in parallel with an ongoing implementation?

For example:

  • Do you create a second SAP Cloud ALM project based on the Upgrade Roadmap?
  • Do you manually add the upgrade tasks to the implementation project?
  • Is there any way to consume both roadmaps within the same project?

I would appreciate any guidance from SAP or implementation partners who have managed Public Cloud projects across mandatory SAP release upgrades.

Thank you.

entry.title: Changing payer field value in the billing document at the S/4HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,
I am integrating my Sap Customer Checkout PoS with my SAP S/4HANA public cloud system, what i want to do is when i create a sales transaction and the payment method is one of the custom payment providers I added, I want the Payer Field only in the billing document to hold this payment provider created customer in the S4. I Tried using plugin but discovered that the CCO sends the business partner fields as one variable and it gets assigned. also Tried doing a BADI but did not find one that can change the payer field.

is there a way to acheive that?

entry.title: Supplier evaluation by inspection lot
entry.content:
Hello, 

How does the supplier evaluation works via inspection lots, the criterion is grayed out and I cannot modify it 

how its calculated?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Screen Personas on mobgui for SAP Public Cloud not working on Ivanti Velocity Web Browser
entry.content:
Hi all,

My current customer is using the Ivanti Velocity Web Browser on his Zebra device to run the RF Mobgui in SAP Public Cloud. As some adjustments needed to be done, screen personas was used to make the changes. 

These changes seem to be working fine in any browser when opening the URL, but when the URL is entered in the Velocity Browser the system throws an error "Sorry, the app could not be opened" . Is Ivanti Velocity Web Browser supported for screen personas using Public Cloud? 

 

Thanks for all your help!
